postNotes: Copy mode registers middleware.IAMSession() without arguments.
If the project needs a non-default session lifetime, call SetSessionExpiration(...) from the copied IAM session service package during project initialization.
If the project needs default users, seed the copied IAM User, PasswordCredential, and EmailIdentity models in project-owned initialization code.
If copied login accepts tenant_id, non-root users need authz RBAC role binding in that tenant; otherwise tenant selection is rejected.
Non-root tenant admin IAM APIs require module/authz RBAC tenant role assignments; without authz they remain root-only through the built-in RBAC fallback.
